title: Add Settings Panel and User Preferences
description: Create a comprehensive settings panel for user preferences. Categories: Appearance (theme, animations, background), Notifications (per-event toggles), Terminal (font size, Rick persona), Performance (star field, animations), Keyboard Shortcuts (customizable), Data (export, import, reset).
acceptance_criteria: Settings view with categorized navigation sidebar
Appearance: animation toggle, background selector, accent color
Notifications: checkbox per event type (completion, error, etc)
Terminal: font size slider, Rick persona toggle
Performance: star field toggle, reduce motion toggle
Keyboard shortcuts: table with action, current binding, rebind button
Data: Export All (JSON), Import, Reset to Defaults buttons
Changes apply immediately with no restart required
Settings persisted to SQLite settings table
agent_output: Settings panel with General, Agent Configuration, Appearance sections. Includes project directory, auto-save toggle, notifications, model selection, budget, allowed tools, theme previews.
